concentration_diagnostic.diagnosis: Symbol concentration is low; the remaining blocker is robustness rather than dependence on one symbol.

cost_diagnostic.diagnosis: Costs remain larger than full-sample gross PnL, so sparse-quality improvement would need to be structural and preregistered.

exit_reason_diagnostic.diagnosis: Stop exits are the main loss source; take and time exits are positive in validation and holdout but not enough to clear the null baseline.

feature_bucket_diagnostic.diagnosis: Feature buckets are informative but not strong or monotonic enough to justify an exact V3 threshold without optimization.

abs_z_residual.diagnostic_signal: bucket behavior is not stable enough to support a no-grid V3 feature threshold

btc_24h_return.diagnostic_signal: multiple positive buckets exist, but ordering is noisy

confirmation_strength.diagnostic_signal: bucket behavior is not stable enough to support a no-grid V3 feature threshold

residual_4h.diagnostic_signal: highest residual_4h bucket is positive in validation and holdout, but lower buckets are noisy

sweep_depth.diagnostic_signal: multiple positive buckets exist, but ordering is noisy

volume_ratio.diagnostic_signal: multiple positive buckets exist, but ordering is noisy

z_residual.diagnostic_signal: bucket behavior is not stable enough to support a no-grid V3 feature threshold

feature_bucket_diagnostic.strongest_feature_bucket_signal: multiple positive buckets exist, but ordering is noisy

limitations: This diagnostic reconstructs exact same-config V2 trade rows because the V2 execution artifact was aggregate-only.
No V3 was tested or run.
No parameter, threshold, TP/SL, hold, universe, cost, ranking, or split was changed.
Bucket diagnostics are descriptive and do not select thresholds.

monthly_stability_diagnostic.diagnosis: Validation and holdout monthly positive rates pass, but large historical drawdowns and a weak null percentile show remaining instability.

null_failure_diagnostic.null_failure_reason: validation percentile was 0.86 instead of >=0.95 because the validation effect remains modest versus shuffled trade PnL; full-sample costs dominate gross PnL; stop exits dominate losses; and historical monthly drawdowns remain large even though validation and holdout are positive.

not_allowed_now: no exact threshold from best bucket
no candidate, edge, runtime, live, or capital claim
suggested_v3_boundaries.suggested_v3_boundary: A bounded V3 design may preregister a structural stop-risk repair for short-only setups while keeping the residual/sweep/confirmation entry stack single-config and without grid search.

trade_level_data_review.raw_panel_read_reason: V2 execution artifact did not contain trade rows; exact same-config reconstruction was required for postmortem diagnostics.
